title: Template To Dos Showing In My Work Area
excerpt: Template to-do’s are showing in the My Work area for me and all employees therefore the My Work area is not showing the correct to-do items. The Templates that have not yet been brought into a workspace should not be sum…

posts.author: arl686s (Alan Lyell)
posts.cookedHtml: Template to-do’s are showing in the My Work area for me and all employees therefore the My Work area is not showing the correct to-do items. The Templates that have not yet been brought into a workspace should not be summarized here.
